playStoreAlert.title: Use the Official Android App!
playStoreAlert.description: For the best performance, Bluetooth printer support, and more stable offline features, please download the FreeKasir app on the Google Play Store.
playStoreAlert.migrationInstructions: Easily migrate your data: 1. Export your backup file via the Backup & Restore menu below. 2. Download and install the app from Google Play Store. 3. Import the backup file in your new app.

desc.inactive: Secure cloud data, access dashboard.freekasir.com, and list your store on market.freekasir.com!
desc.selectStore: Subscription is active, but the device hasn't been linked to a store. Select a store to sync data.
desc.needsSetup: Store is linked, but automatic sync isn't enabled yet. Set up a schedule so data syncs regularly.
desc.active: Sync is active. Monitor store reports in real-time on dashboard.freekasir.com from any device.

installApp.title: Install as App
installApp.hint: Open directly from home screen, no browser needed

installHelp.title: How to Install the App
installHelp.description: Your browser doesn't show the automatic install button. Follow the steps below for your device.
installHelp.iosStep1: Open this app in Safari browser (not Chrome).
installHelp.iosStep2: Tap the <0 /> Share button at the bottom of the screen.
installHelp.iosStep3: Select "Add to Home Screen", then tap Add.
installHelp.androidStep1: Open this app in Chrome or Edge browser.
installHelp.androidStep2: Tap the (⋮) menu in the top-right corner of the browser.
installHelp.androidStep3: Select "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
installHelp.troubleshoot: If the option doesn't appear, refresh the page first and try again. Some browsers need a second visit before offering to install.

activate.title: Activate Multi-User
activate.description: Create employee accounts with limited access. Your data stays secure.

manage.title: Manage Employees
manage.description: {{count}} registered accounts · manage access per employee

active.title: Multi-User Active
active.description: Staff must login to access the cashier

activateDialog.title: Activate Multi-User
activateDialog.description: Create an owner account. After activation, you'll need to login with this username & PIN every time you open the app. Your store data stays intact.
activateDialog.warningText: Keep your username & PIN safe. If you forget, the only way to reset is by clearing app data (store data will also be deleted). Make sure you have a backup.

disableDialog.title: Disable Multi-User?
disableDialog.description: The app will return to no-login mode. Employee accounts will be kept and will be active again if multi-user is re-enabled. Transaction data stays intact.

logoutDialog.title: Log Out?
logoutDialog.description: You will be directed to the login page. Make sure there are no open bills unsaved.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Record non-stock operational costs (electricity, salary, rent, etc.)

allowDebt.title: Allow Down Payment (DP)
allowDebt.description: Cashier can accept a partial payment (DP) before final settlement, or full payment upfront

receiptFooter.title: Receipt Settings
receiptFooter.description: Configure receipt footer text and logo printing options
receiptFooter.placeholder: Example: Thank you for your visit!

stockOpname.title: Stock Opname
stockOpname.description: Adjust physical product stocks and record differences

cashierLayout.title: Cashier Layout
cashierLayout.description: Choose grid (cards) or rows (list) layout for product list

reportIssue.title: Report Issue
reportIssue.description: Report application errors or technical issues to the developer

telegramSupport.title: Telegram Support
telegramSupport.description: Contact FreeKasir support team via Telegram

bluetoothPrinter.title: Bluetooth Printer
bluetoothPrinter.notSelected: Not selected — receipts will be printed to the first paired printer found.
bluetoothPrinter.hint: Make sure the printer is paired via Android Bluetooth Settings first.

privacyAnalytics.title: Privacy & Analytics
privacyAnalytics.label: Help Us with Anonymous Data
privacyAnalytics.description: Send anonymous usage statistics (pages visited & actions like creating products/transactions) to help development. Business data such as product names, prices, and transaction amounts are never sent.

toast.multiUserEnabled: Multi-user enabled. You are logged in as owner.

promo.title: Reach More Customers!
promo.description: Activate your Online Store to make your store publicly accessible with various benefits:
promo.benefit1: Showcase on market.freekasir.com to reach new buyers
promo.benefit2: Customers can view your online menu in real-time from mobile
promo.benefit3: Your own unique online store link/identifier

hero.title: Upgrade to FreeKasir Cloud
hero.description: Monitor reports in real-time at {{dashboard}} and promote your store online at {{market}}!

safe.title: Data Safe in Cloud
safe.desc: Data is automatically stored & remains intact even if your phone is lost, damaged, or replaced.

dashboard.title: Access Web Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Monitor detailed store reports in real-time from any phone or laptop at {{dashboard}}.

market.title: Online Menu & Market
market.desc: Create an online menu catalog easily so customers can view your products at {{market}}.

growth.title: Grow Your Business
growth.desc: Attract more buyers, increase sales, and easily manage multiple stores/branches!

cloudBackup.loginHint: Safe & fast — no new password needed.

subscription.description: Monitor sales, stock, & store finances from anywhere — just open on another phone or laptop. All data is safely stored in the cloud and remains intact even if the device is lost, damaged, or replaced.
subscription.extendOrChange: Choose the same plan to renew, or another plan to switch.

noStore.title: No store in the cloud yet
noStore.description: Subscription is active, but data is <0>not yet synced</0> because there is no store. Create a store first so reports appear on the dashboard.

deviceNotLinked.title: Device not linked to a store
deviceNotLinked.description: Select a store so data can be synced to the cloud.

manageStore.title: Manage Stores
manageStore.subtitle: Select or create a store to sync

toast.paymentNotDetected: Payment not yet detected. Please complete the payment first.
toast.selectStoreFirst: Select a store first in the Manage Store menu.

paymentDialog.title: Waiting for Payment
paymentDialog.description: Complete the payment on the opened page. Subscription status will activate automatically once we receive the payment.
paymentDialog.checking: Automatically checking payment status every few seconds…

cloudAutoBackup.title: Automatic Sync
cloudAutoBackup.requiresSubscription: Enable FreeKasir Cloud subscription first to set up automatic sync.
cloudAutoBackup.scheduleNote: Sync runs automatically when the app opens if the interval has passed. (PWA does not run sync in the background when the app is closed.)

cloudHistory.title: Transaction History
cloudHistory.loginPrompt: Login first to view transaction history.

toast.pending: Payment not detected yet. Please try again in a moment.

cloudStore.title: Manage Stores
cloudStore.requiresSubscription: FreeKasir Cloud subscription is required to manage stores.

atLimit.title: Your plan's store limit is full
atLimit.description: Current plan only allows {{max}} stores. Upgrade FreeKasir Cloud plan to add more.

cloudStore.noStore: No stores yet. Create your first store.
cloudStore.storeNamePlaceholder: Store name, e.g. Jakarta Branch Store
cloudStore.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? All sync data (products, transactions, etc.) will be permanently deleted from the cloud.

toast.bind: This device is connected to the store.
toast.delete: Store and all its sync data deleted.
toast.createBound: Store created and device automatically connected.
toast.atLimit: Your plan's store limit is full. Upgrade plan to add more stores.

transactionHistory.title: Transaction History
transactionHistory.searchPlaceholder: Search receipt no. or product name...

empty.withDateFilter: No transactions in this date range

detail.title: Transaction Detail
detail.noDeletePermission: You don't have permission to delete transactions

deleteDialog.title: Delete Transaction?
deleteDialog.description: Transaction {{receiptNumber}} worth {{amount}} will be permanently deleted.

deleteAllDialog.title: Delete All Transactions?
deleteAllDialog.description: All {{count}} transactions along with related debts & installments will be permanently deleted. Product stock will not be restored. This action cannot be undone.

toast.hasDebtPayments: Transaction cannot be deleted because it has debt payments already

deleteDialog.title: Delete Supplier?
deleteDialog.description: Deleted supplier data cannot be recovered.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Customer?
deleteDialog.description: Deleted customer data cannot be recovered. Old transactions still keep the customer name.

toast.invalidAmount: Payment amount must be more than Rp0 and not exceed the remaining debt

dialog.missingCategories: No expense categories yet. Add them first in Settings.
dialog.missingPaymentMethods: No payment methods yet. Add them first in Settings.
dialog.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Pay this month's electricity bill

deleteDialog.title: Delete expense?
deleteDialog.description: "{{title}}" amounting to {{amount}} will be deleted. This record will not be included in reports.

dialog.renameHint: All products using "{{old}}" will be automatically renamed to "{{new}}".

deleteDialog.title: Delete Unit "{{name}}"?
deleteDialog.inUse: Currently used by {{count}} products. Existing products will keep the unit "{{name}}", but this unit will no longer appear in the options when adding/editing new products.
deleteDialog.safe: This unit is not used by any products. Safe to delete.

toast.wasDeleted: Unit "{{name}}" was previously deleted. Use a different name or restore via backup.

cashier.title: Cashier
cashier.scanPlaceholder: Scan / type SKU or Barcode then press Enter...

empty.outOfStock: All products are out of stock. Add stock first in the Stock In menu.
empty.noProducts: No products yet. Add products first in the Products menu.

checkout.title: Payment
checkout.debtDesc: Payment may be partially or fully as debt
checkout.remainingDebtHint: Customer must be selected from the list

saveConfirmDialog.title: Save Bill
saveConfirmDialog.description: Would you like to print a Kitchen Ticket after saving this bill?

cancelDialog.title: Cancel Bill?
cancelDialog.description: This bill will be deleted and product stock will be restored.

toast.selectCustomerForDebt: Select a customer from the list for debt transactions
toast.paymentAmountRange: Payment amount must be between {{symbol}}0 and the transaction total
toast.selectPaymentMethod: Select a method for the initial payment
toast.noCategoryForCustom: Create a product category first before using custom items

loginScreen.forgotPin: Forgot PIN? Contact the store owner to reset.

receipt.title: Transaction Receipt
receipt.disclaimer: If items are not collected within 1 month of the pickup date stated on this receipt, the service provider reserves the right to sell, auction, or transfer ownership of the items to cover operational costs.

toast.bluetoothUnavailable: Bluetooth is not available in this browser. Use Chrome on Android.
toast.printFailed: Failed to print. Make sure the Bluetooth printer is on.

notEnabled.title: Multi-user is not active
notEnabled.description: Enable it in Settings first to manage employees and access.

users.notOwner: Only the store owner can manage employees.
users.title: Employees & Access
users.desc: Manage who can access what in your store. The owner always has full access.

dialog.descAdd: Employee will login with username and PIN.
dialog.descEdit: Change name and access. Username cannot be changed; use the reset PIN button to change the PIN.
dialog.ownerNotice: Owner always has full access to all features.

pinReset.title: Reset PIN {{name}}
pinReset.desc: Enter a new PIN. The old PIN will be replaced immediately and {{name}} must log in again with the new PIN.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Account {{name}}?
deleteDialog.description: The account will be permanently deleted. Transaction history created by this account will not be deleted, but the cashier name will appear as "—".

toast.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3-20 characters, letters/numbers/underscore only
toast.cannotSelfDisable: Cannot deactivate the currently logged-in account

backupReminder.title: Backup Your Data
backupReminder.neverBackedUp: You have not backed up data yet
backupReminder.errorCreateShare: Failed to create / share backup file

pushPermission.title: Enable Notifications?
pushPermission.description: So you do not miss important updates directly on your phone — without opening the app.

benefits.cloudBackup: Cloud backup status: success, failure, or quota almost full.
benefits.payment: Payment confirmation & reminders before subscription ends.
benefits.announcement: Maintenance info & important announcements from FreeKasir.

pushPermission.hint: You can turn it off anytime from browser settings.

stockOpname.title: Stock Opname
stockOpname.emptyDraft: No products are currently tracked for stock

excel.uploadError: Invalid file format or failed to read Excel data

dialog.submitDescription: Product stock balances in the system will be permanently updated to match your physical stock count. The differences will be recorded in stock movements.

receiptSettings.title: Receipt Settings
receiptSettings.printLogoDescription: Print the store logo at the very top of the physical receipt. Ensure your thermal printer supports image/bitmap printing.
receiptSettings.hideWatermarkDescActive: Hide the "Printed From FreeKasir.com App" watermark at the bottom of the receipt.
receiptSettings.hideWatermarkDescRequired: Watermark can only be disabled if FreeKasir Cloud is active.

cloudOnlineStore.title: Online Store & Market
cloudOnlineStore.linkedStoreRequired: This device is not linked to a cloud store. Please link it first on the FreeKasir Cloud settings page.

identifier.label: Store URL (Identifier)
identifier.available: Congratulations! The store URL is available.
identifier.notAvailable: Sorry, this store URL is already taken.
identifier.invalid: Invalid URL format (use only letters, numbers, and hyphens).
identifier.slugInfo: Your store will be accessible at:

visibility.title: Show Store in Market
visibility.description: Enable to make your store product catalog publicly viewable at market.freekasir.com.
visibility.requiresIdentifier: Store URL must be saved before making the store public.
visibility.unsavedIdentifier: There are unsaved Store URL changes. Please save the Store URL first.
visibility.unsavedDetails: There are unsaved store detail changes. Please save the store details first.
visibility.incompleteDetails: All store data must be filled before making the store public. The following details are missing: {{fields}}

location.title: Map Coordinates (Map Picker)
location.dragPin: Drag the pin on the map to adjust your store's precise location.

logo.title: Store Logo
logo.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this store logo?
logo.requirements: Max 2 MB. Format: JPG, PNG, WebP
logo.tooLarge: File size exceeds the 2 MB limit.
logo.invalidType: Invalid file type. Please use JPG, PNG, or WebP images.

issueReport.title: Report Issue
issueReport.placeholder: Describe the error or issue you are experiencing in as much detail as possible...
issueReport.disclaimer: By submitting a report, your device's technical information (such as browser version, screen resolution, and OS) will also be sent to make it easier to fix.
issueReport.confirmDescription:
We will send the issue details along with your device's technical information to the developer team.

Do you agree and wish to proceed?
issueReport.success: Issue report submitted successfully. Thank you!
issueReport.failed: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
issueReport.networkError: A network error occurred while submitting the report.
issueReport.emptyError: Please fill in the issue description first.
